title: What's Your Husband Doing?
writer: George V. Hobart, R. Cecil Smith
actors: Douglas MacLean, Doris May, Walter Hiers
plot: Beatrice Ridley suspects her new husband of infidelity because he continually receives letters from the notorious café, the Honeysuckle Inn. Beatrice consults lawyer John P. Widgast, who, with his partner Charley Pidgeon, speciali...
